title: Satori’s Trial Turns Deadly — Part 5
description: Satori uses mantra and surprise traps to overwhelm Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp inside the Ordeal of Balls.
scene: Across pages 18, this scene centers on Satori, Luffy, Sanji, Usopp, Gan Fall. Satori uses mantra and surprise traps to overwhelm Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp inside the Ordeal of Balls.
